## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] `go vet ./...` and lint pass
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated docs / `CHANGELOG.md` if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal telemetry data included
